name: io.github.homenshum/nodebench
title: NodeBench MCP
description: Turn messy input into a sourced report. NodeBench MCP starts with a 9-tool workflow lane, expands via discover_tools and load_toolset, and keeps heavier power/admin domains off the default hot path.

environmentVariables.description: Gemini API key for web search and entity enrichment
environmentVariables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: OpenAI API key for embeddings and LLM tools
environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
